sections_cited: Section 170 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No. D- 460 of 2026 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ For hearing of main case. 12.02.2026 Mr. Hyder Ali Khan, Advocate for the Petitioner. ---------- Mr. Faheem Raza, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of the department. The case of the Petitioner is that its Refund Applications under Section 170 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001 for Tax Years 2006 to 2014, 2018 and 2019 (Annexure “G”, Pages 215 to 233 of the Court file) remain pending despite lapse of the time period prescribed for their decision under the Statute. That much is not controverted by counsel for the department. That being so, we deem it fit and proper to dispose of the Petition with the direction that the Refund Applications be decided by the competent authority through a speaking order after hearing the Petitioner within a period of 30 days from today. Judge Judge Ayaz
